narrative:
Cincinnati 5-D (precinct in Hamilton County) has 1,353 registered voters, with 53.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.4%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.5 percentage points.
